issues.description: Main effect trigger should be 'OnPlay' not 'Activated'. Activated is for abilities you choose to use; Main effects trigger automatically when played.

Second effect structure is incorrect. The DON!! cost mechanic should not be a separate 'Trigger' effect. The cost (return DON!! to deck) is part of the card's activation cost, not a separate triggered effect.
Target should specify 'max': 1 to represent 'up to 1' opponent Character.
Duration 'EndOfTurn' is correct for 'during this turn', but the structure implies this is the only effect. The DON!! cost return must be represented.
